title: geranium × fragrans
intro: Geranium × fragrans, also known as sweet-scented geranium or fragrant geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium genus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Geranium × fragrans include soothing digestive issues, relieving stress and anxiety, and supporting immune function, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
